title: setaria viridis var. reclinata
intro: Setaria viridis var. reclinata, also known as green foxtail or prostrate bristlegrass, is a perennial grass native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems, among other health benefits. Setaria viridis var. reclinata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
